summary: Compared our CRC liquid biopsy panel against the cMCD 21-biomarker ctDNA methylation panel (Clinical Epigenetics 2026, doi:10.1186/s13148-026-02097-x). 17/21 cMCD gene loci overlap with our tissue signatures and cfDNA validated markers. 4 genes (BMP3, APC, MGMT, RASSF1) were excluded by our delta-beta >= 0.3 tissue filter but have significant cfDNA discriminative signal (p < 0.05). Our panel is protein-only (7 markers, $155/test) while cMCD is methylation-only (21 markers). The sensitivity gap (47.7% vs 87.82%) is primarily due to our current panel using protein surrogates (mRNA expression) rather than actual cfDNA methylation markers.

missing_gene_analysis.filter_reason: All 4 genes excluded by tissue delta-beta >= 0.3 threshold. Their CpGs have statistically significant but moderate tissue effect sizes (0.16-0.27).

BMP3.recommendation: ADD — key Cologuard marker, strong cfDNA signal despite moderate tissue effect

APC.recommendation: OPTIONAL — classic CRC gene but weak cfDNA signal in available data

MGMT.recommendation: ADD — significant cfDNA signal, clinically relevant (treatment response)

RASSF1.recommendation: ADD — near threshold, strongest missing gene cfDNA signal, established CRC biomarker

novel_cmcd_markers_in_our_data.note: These 3 cMCD markers are novel (not in standard CRC panels) and all present in our data

our_panel_vs_cmcd.gap_explanation: Primary factor: our optimized panel is protein-only. The mixed panel showed AUC=1.0 in prior analysis but was invalidated (synthetic methylation features). A true multi-analyte panel with co-measured cfDNA methylation + proteins is needed. Secondary factor: 4 cMCD genes filtered out by aggressive delta-beta threshold.

immediate: Lower delta-beta threshold to 0.20 to recover BMP3, RASSF1, and MGMT CpGs
Re-run cfDNA validation pipeline with recovered CpGs included
Build a methylation-only classifier using all 21 cMCD gene CpGs (17 present + recovered)
Test additive value of protein markers on top of methylation classifier

cost_impact.estimated_combined_cost: $230-255 (still under GRAIL $949, above Cologuard $650 in some contexts)
cost_impact.note: Still cost-effective if sensitivity improves to >80%

priority_markers_to_add.reason: Strongest cfDNA signal among missing genes (p=0.00003), near delta-beta threshold
Key Cologuard marker, strong cfDNA signal (p=0.0002)

recommendations.validation_needed: Co-measured protein + cfDNA methylation on same patient cohort (our current data uses separate datasets)
